channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Fuel Pass app launched for 2 Dhaka pumps

- ‘Fuel Pass’ app launched on pilot basis to ensure transparency in fuel distribution
- ‘Fuel Pass’ app at two Dhaka filling stations , fuel to be taken via QR code

- ‘Fuel Pass’ app pilot launched at two Dhaka filling stations
- QR code-based ‘Fuel Pass’ piloted in Dhaka
